title: Magic-Endless Mirror
description: Adds the Magic Mirror and Endless Mirror, mystical items that teleport players back to their bed or world spawn.
body:
This mod introduces two new items that allow players to quickly return to safety. Both mirrors teleport the player to their bed or respawn anchor, and if none exist, they will safely place the player at the world spawn.

The Magic Mirror provides teleportation with a short channel time but consumes durability each time it is used and will eventually break once its durability runs out. The Endless Mirror functions the same way but has no durability limit, allowing for infinite uses.

Both mirrors ensure safe placement on solid ground and are designed to feel lightweight and vanilla-friendly. This mod offers a simple and balanced way to escape danger and return home without breaking the natural feel of the game.
